title: poa nemoralis var. coarctata
intro: Poa nemoralis var. coarctata, also known as narrow-leaved meadow-grass, is a variety of the Poa nemoralis plant species, typically found in grasslands and meadows. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis var. coarctata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herb for addressing various health issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, often used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain conditions.
